channel.title: second brain

item.title: Home
item.description: SYSTEMS NOMINAL CPT-A320 · HYD BASE · A320 BASE · HYD 14:15:11 ZULU · UTC 08:45:11 Good afternoon, Captain Pavan SECOND BRAIN ONLINE · 3 CAPTURES NEXT REPORT — COUNTDOWN A320 / 2-Sector HYD → PAT → HYD REPORT WED 17 JUN · 14:25 · LOCAL BASE TIME ⌁ QUICK CAPTURE ⌘K + TODAY'S LOG ⌘D 03 DAYS : 00 HRS : 09 MIN : 48 SEC ROSTER · FULL CALENDAR JUNE 2026 — DUTY DENSITY · FATIGUE STALE · 1D AGO DAY WEEK MONTH eCrew → _data/roster.md · Last written: 13 Jun, 14:01 IST · To update: sync eCrew calendar then append to roster.md ◄ MAY 2026 JUNE 2026 JUL 2026 ► MONTUEWEDTHUFRISATSUN MON 1 AVC AVC HYD TUE 2 AVC AVC HYD WED 3 AVC AVC HYD THU 4 AVC AVC HYD FRI 5 HYD-DEL1 ✈ HYD-DEL1 02:05 SAT 6 DEL1-HYD DEL1-HYD 02:05 SUN 7 4-SECTOR HYD-GOI-HYD-BBI1-HYD 05:20 MON 8 — TUE 9 PMO PMO HYD WED 10 SCK SCK HYD THU 11 SCK SCK HYD FRI 12 HYD-VTZ-HYD HYD-VTZ-HYD 07:40 SAT 13 2-SECTOR HYD-DEL1-HYD 04:40 SUN 14 SBYP Standby HYD MON 15 — TUE 16 OFG OFG HYD WED 17 2-SECTOR HYD-PAT-HYD 04:05 THU 18 OFG OFG HYD FRI 19 2-SECTOR HYD-DEL1-HYD 04:45 SAT 20 4-SECTOR HYD-VTZ-HYD-JDH-HYD 06:40 SUN 21 HYD-SHJ ✈ HYD-SHJ 03:40 MON 22 2-SECTOR SHJ-TRV2-HYD 06:15 TUE 23 — WED 24 OFG OFG HYD THU 25 2-SECTOR ✈ HYD-TRZ-SIN2 06:00 FRI 26 SIN2-HYD SIN2-HYD 04:35 SAT 27 OFG OFG HYD SUN 28 SBYP Standby HYD MON 29 HYD-KWI1 ✈ HYD-KWI1 05:05 TUE 30 — ROSTER PATTERN 13 DUTY DAYS 62:55 BLOCK HRS 9 BASE RTN 4 LAYOVERS 2 4-SECTOR ■ Duty■ Rest■ Family■ Personal■ Standby 💪 workout · 👨‍👩‍👧 family · 😴 rest · ✈ away  ·  double-click to open COMPLIANCE · AMBER · 2 VIOLATIONS ▼ HUMAN FACTORS · THIS MONTH 1 WOCL DUTIES 2 RED-EYE 4 MAX CONSEC 10.0 AVG FATIGUE DUTY FATIGUE DISTRIBUTION 4 LOW 4 MOD 5 HIGH FTL BLOCK HOURS 38:35 ·100· 28-DAY 357:23 ·1000· 165D DGCA-CAR-FTL · reg 2026.01 · max_28_day_block_hours v1.0.0⊙ 28-day total includes scheduled block hours REST / DUTY RATIO 0.85 AVG FDP / DUTY 07:17 1 NOTES · LAST 42 DAYS 0.2/WK · TARGET 7 The heatmap, balance & FTL all wait on this. Target: 1 note/day × 14 days. 3 T/O + LDG (90-day)6d Visa · USA28d Class 1 Medical81d Licence / IR137d Passport235dinbox: -
